title: Site Health Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 3 — populated site-health family schema. Site Health depends on every provisioned object family (validates that pages, libraries, lists, fields, views, modules, groups, integrations, and provisioning state all exist and conform). Captures named drift checks (§19.1, 20+), severity classification (§19.3, 5-value canonical enum), and Repair Automation tier (§19A.1, 4-value canonical enum). Audit trail must avoid raw payload and secrets: beforeAuditState and afterAuditState are redacted compact-JSON strings; auditTrail entries carry sanitized actor, timestamp, action, and reason only. Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/site-health.fields.json. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24). VR-13 (no secrets), VR-17 (audit posture), VR-21 (severity), VR-22 (repair tier).

checkId.description: Stable identifier for the named §19.1 check (20+ checks: site exists, pages exist, libraries exist, lists exist, fields exist, views exist, app installed, module configuration exists, groups exist, global read-only applied, project team assignments valid, integration placeholders exist, template version current, no permission breakage, no missing navigation, no broken webparts, emergency repair reconciled, Procore mapping exists, ProcoreProjectId present, ProcoreProjectUrl present, Procore project reachable, enabled subject areas healthy, backend credentials available, last successful sync in tolerance, sync errors redacted, deep links configured, no stale materializations, no secrets found, ProcoreCompanyId is 5280, ConfiguredBy reflects PM/PX).

driftedResourceRef.description: Path / reference to the drifted resource (page, list, library, field, group, etc.). Site Health's coverage spans every provisioned object family.

severity.description: Severity classification per §19.3 canonical 5-value enum. VR-21.

repairTier.description: Repair Automation tier per §19A.1 canonical 4-value enum. VR-22.

lastChecked.description: UTC timestamp of last check run.

detail.description: Plain-language detail. Must not contain raw payload, tokens, or URLs with secrets. VR-13.

repairAvailable.description: Whether a repair is available for this finding.

beforeAuditState.description: Compact JSON string of pre-repair state, redacted of all secrets and raw payload. VR-13.

afterAuditState.description: Compact JSON string of post-repair state, redacted of all secrets and raw payload. VR-13.

auditTrail.description: Sanitized audit entries; no raw payload or secrets permitted. VR-17.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.

siteHealthSeverity.description: Canonical Site Health severity enum from Contract §19.3 (5 values). Bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.SiteHealthSeverity.

repairAutomationTier.description: Canonical Repair Automation tier enum from Contract §19A.1 (4 values). Bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.RepairAutomationTier.

auditEntry.description: Sanitized audit entry. Must not contain raw payload, tokens, or URLs with secrets.

actorUpn.description: UPN of actor (human or service principal).

reason.description: Plain-language reason; redacted of secrets. VR-13.

beforeState.description: Compact JSON of pre-action state, redacted of secrets. VR-13.

afterState.description: Compact JSON of post-action state, redacted of secrets. VR-13.
